titleStmt.title: SII 35.20: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 20. (A.R. No. 72 of 1951-52.) ABLŪR, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone (No. I) set up near the Grāmadēvata temple.
This damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalla.

It states that the king's subordinate Daṇḍanāyaka Mahādēvarasa was governing Banavāsi-12000 and Huligeṟe-300. Contains a description of Māyidēva Daṇḍādhīśa who was a subordinate of the above. He seems to have belonged to the Sahavāsi tantra of Rāyanārayaṇapura in Kaḷyāna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra cāmaracāravē
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ
jaṁ paramēśvaraṁparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire .
nāhavakkelaṁ¨rmmadu kappamanittanatta Ā māḷadavarājanaḷuki maḍevūkka bhayajvaradiṁdegū¨rjara
cōḷana koṭṭudakkadikamittu ba¨rddukida mattamānya bhūpāḷakarelli māḷpesakepūṇḍuda nū¨rmmaḍi
tailapacakrava¨rtige . śrīmaccaḷukyarāyaroḷirāyaruḷappa namama traiḷōkyamahipāḷaṁ vīraśrīramane
ṇanakhiḷa rājyaśrīyatāḷdi¨rddanammara kaḷpāyuvaraṁ . vmacana . matte nijabhujapratāpadiṁ pratāpacakra
va¨rtti sakaḷa bhūbhāramaṁ tāḷdi sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁrājyaṁgeyuttamire . tatpāda padmōpajīvi . svasti samadigata
paṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipatimahāpracaṁḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ . vairibhayadāyakaṁ . turayarēvantaṁ
vairikritāntaṁ naṭa nagna gāyakaṁ puṇyapātaka māgadavandibrinda sukaṁ kānanda mākanda śaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjara vairi
di kuṁjaru Āśrītajanakaḷpavrikṣaṁ . patikā¨ryyadakṣa Ayyanagaṁdevāraṇa . maccaripa vairi va¨rgganivāraṇaṁ rasitu
raya paṭṭasāhaṇimaneve¨rggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁmagaṁmahādēvarasaru banavāsi panni¨rccāsiramumaṁ huligeṟe mū
nūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigraha siṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdarasugeyvuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi
© svāmige besakeyvaḍeyoḷu rāmana hanumantanamaramaṁ triyenippaṁ somacatu
sāmānyage māyidēvadaṇḍādhīśa . patihitadeḍagadināpasutanepavana janinekkadādu
diśāgajavrita rājitakī¨rtti māyidēvadaṁḍādhīśa . Ā mahānubhāvananvaya
śōnnatarappa kalyāṇada rāyanārāyaṇapurada sahavāsitaṁtradoḷage
ya¨rgga Āmayyanasatipatibratāguṇadoḷa kuṁdatiṁgamagaḷamappa
tāmaregagasthaḷadoḷu sasipuṭṭumānmadi vri ca ta doḷage pu
yanisi māyidēvaṁ nega¨rdda Antunega¨rtta
paḍedu prajeyiṁ pratipāḷisi sukhadi
ḷēśvaraṁ . bānnavayaravarādhiṣṭara maḷapa
va¨rgganivāraṇaṁ . vairimanneya subhaṭalalāṭapa
Āyyana kēdāṟaṁ śrīmatupraṇamēśvaradēvara dibya
praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ
damanigraha
lines are damaged-worn out
Digital edition of SII 35.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
